title: Trespass to land
summary: 9084 Tort — direct interference with possession, without lawful justification.
learningObjectives: Define trespass to land and protected possession.
Analyse remedies: damages, injunction, recovery of land.
Distinguish trespass from nuisance and negligence.

simpleExplanation.title: Unlawful entry to land
simpleExplanation.summary: Trespass is any direct physical interference with another's possession of land — no proof of damage is needed.
steps: Possession — claimant need not own, must possess.
Actionable per se — no damage required.

sections.content: **Trespass to land** (4.2.4) completes 4.2. Contrast **trespass vs nuisance** (direct vs indirect).

sections.label: Mark a trespass to land question
